items.title: And now welcome Obi Toppin, Ben Sheppard, and Quenton Jackson to the mix.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: And now welcome Obi Toppin, Ben Sheppard, and Quenton Jackson to the mix.

items.title: Spilled too much ink on the next steps for the Pacers here. More concise: They can't fit in Nance under the first apron without either A) signing him to an Exhibit 10 deal or B) waiving either Micah Potter or Quenton Jackson. Looking for the clarity.
items.author: Tony East
